parameters.query: DELETE FROM vehicles; SELECT 'vehicles cleared' as status;
DELETE FROM drivers; SELECT 'drivers cleared' as status;

parameters.columns: number, date, organization, contractor_id, contractor_name, vehicle_id, vehicle_number, driver_id, driver_name, responsible_logist, route, payment_term, payment_condition, amount
id, number, date_from, date_to, driver_id, driver_name, vehicle_id, vehicle_number, fuel_start, fuel_end, mileage, fuel_quantity, fuel_amount, total_expenses, driver_accruals, driver_payments

parameters.query: DELETE FROM expense_categories WHERE driver_report_id IN (SELECT id FROM driver_reports WHERE date_from >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'); SELECT 'expense_categories cleared' as status;

=INSERT INTO import_log (sync_time, vehicles_count, drivers_count, contracts_count, driver_reports_count, expense_categories_count, status, errors)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.sync_time }}',
  {{ $json.vehicles }},
  {{ $json.drivers }},
  {{ $json.contracts }},
  {{ $json.driver_reports }},
  {{ $json.expense_categories }},
  '{{ $json.status }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.errors) }}'
)
ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;

assignments.name: message
message
